opportunities.title: [Hiring] Curly hair stylist, Delhi, in person
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Curly hair stylist, Delhi, in person

21M in Delhi. Curly hair, no cut in about 9 months. It has gotten dense and shapeless, comes down around my ears now, frizzes badly, and I am fairly sure the ends are split. I am not looking for advice on what to do. I am looking to pay someone to be there in person and handle it. Either of these works for me: You cut curly hair yourself. We meet at your salon in Delhi, or you come to me. You know curly hair well and will come to the appointment with me and tell the barber exactly how to cut it, and keep an eye on it while it happens. What I want
